display.purpose: Empty states, welcome screens. Appears when there's nothing else on screen.

headline.purpose: Page titles (Search Results, Your Lists). One per page.

title.purpose: Section headings, results headers, card group labels.

body.purpose: All prose, table cells, email preview text. max-width: 65ch.

label.purpose: Table column headers, field hints, hotel card metadata. The workhorse.

caption.purpose: Chip counts, status tags, timestamp dates. Use sparingly.

dapple-display.purpose: Quicksand — Dapples wordmark, hero and section headings on marketing/new surfaces.

dapple-body.purpose: Nunito Sans — body copy on Dapples marketing/new surfaces.

shadows.name: micro
shadows.purpose: Toggle group active pill. Barely-there separation.

shadows.name: low
shadows.purpose: Hotel cards and map container at rest.

shadows.name: lifted
shadows.purpose: Search hero card — the primary workspace entry point.

shadows.name: hover
shadows.purpose: Hotel card on hover, paired with translateY(-4px).

shadows.name: popup
shadows.purpose: Map detail popup. Highest in-page z-stack.

motion.name: fast
motion.purpose: Nav item backgrounds, button hover, tab transitions.

motion.name: standard
motion.purpose: Card hover transform+shadow, chevron rotation, spinner.

motion.name: enter
motion.purpose: FadeUp entrance for hotel cards (opacity + translateY).

motion.name: shimmer
motion.purpose: Skeleton loading animation — warm gradient sweep.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Sidebar switches from drawer to sticky. Top bar hidden.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Full-width within search card; the main search action.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: block; width: 100%; padding: 14px 20px; background: #0F2544; color: #F7F3EF; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 0.2s, background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #162F54; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E85D3D; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { opacity: 0.85; }

components.name: Coral Action Button
components.description: Secondary CTAs with energy: Find Emails, Send DM, Launch Sequence.
components.css: .ds-btn-coral { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 9px 16px; background: #E85D3D; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-btn-coral:hover { background: #B83A22; } .ds-btn-coral:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E85D3D; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-coral:active { background: #8c2c15; }

components.name: Pill Tab Button
components.description: Property type tabs: Hotels, Vacation Rentals, Apartments.
components.css: .ds-tab-pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; padding: 9px 18px; border-radius: 24px; border: 1.5px solid #DDD5CC; background: #fff; color: #0F2544; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.15s; } .ds-tab-pill--active { background: #fff; color: #0F2544; border-color: #0F2544; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(15,37,68,0.10); } .ds-tab-pill:hover:not(.ds-tab-pill--active) { background: #F7F3EF; } .ds-tab-count { background: #F0EBE5; color: #0F2544; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 12px; min-width: 20px; text-align: center; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Location search field inside the search hero card.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; background: #fff; border: 1.5px solid #DDD5CC; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; transition: border-color 0.15s; } .ds-input-wrap:focus-within { border-color: #0F2544; } .ds-input-icon { flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-input-search { flex: 1; border: none; outline: none; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; color: #1E3A5F; background: transparent; } .ds-input-search::placeholder { color: #9FB3C8; }

components.name: Hotel Card
components.description: Search result card with photo, rating, and add-to-list action.
components.html:
The Grand Pacific

⭐ 4.8 · $$$ · San Francisco, CA
components.css: .ds-hotel-card { background: #fff; border-radius: 14px; overflow: hidden; box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(15,37,68,0.08); border: 1px solid rgba(15,37,68,0.06); transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-hotel-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(15,37,68,0.13); } .ds-hotel-img { height: 160px; background: #EDE8E3; } .ds-hotel-body { padding: 14px 16px; } .ds-hotel-name { font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1E3A5F; margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-hotel-meta { font-size: 0.8125rem; color: #9FB3C8; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-hotel-add { width: 100%; padding: 9px 12px; border: 1.5px solid #DDD5CC; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; background: #F7F3EF; color: #1E3A5F; transition: all 0.15s; } .ds-hotel-add:hover { background: #F0EBE5; border-color: #0F2544; }

components.name: Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation item — icon + label, with active state.
components.html: Search
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); } .ds-nav-item--active { background: rgba(232,93,61,0.18); } .ds-nav-label { font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #7A9BBF; flex: 1; } .ds-nav-item--active .ds-nav-label { color: #F5A882; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Toolbar actions — view toggle, list/map switch.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; padding: 7px 14px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Manrope, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; color: #7A9BBF; background: transparent; transition: all 0.15s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #0F2544; background: #F0EBE5; } .ds-btn-ghost--active { background: #fff; color: #0F2544; box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(15,37,68,0.10); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E85D3D; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview:
StayFind carries the feeling of a great hotel front desk: quietly confident, warm before you even ask, never flustered. The interface knows what you need and has it ready. It does not announce itself — it recedes, and the creator's work comes forward.

The color strategy is restrained: Deep Harbour navy grounds the system with authority, Coral Spark activates the things that matter, and a warm off-white canvas keeps everything breathable. Nothing on this tool fights for attention.

Notion is the reference for editorial calm. This is not generic SaaS blue, not creator-pink softness, not a consumer travel booking engine. It is a tool a creator reaches for between trips — purposeful, premium, and invisible.
keyCharacteristics: Dark navy sidebar anchors authority without aggression
Warm canvas body keeps the workspace inviting, not clinical
Coral Spark used only where it matters: primary actions, active states, brand mark
Manrope carries the full hierarchy — one family, multiple weights, no pairing needed
Shadows are navy-tinted — every drop of depth belongs to the brand

rules.name: The Coral Ration Rule
rules.body: Coral Spark (#E85D3D) appears on at most two elements at the same time on any given screen. Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Navy Shadow Rule
rules.body: All box-shadow values use rgba(15,37,68,...) as their color base, never generic rgba(0,0,0,...). Shadows are navy-tinted.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Manrope carries the entire type system. Do not introduce a second typeface. Hierarchy is created through weight and size contrast, not family contrast.

rules.name: The 500-On-Dark Rule
rules.body: Any text on the Deep Harbour navy sidebar must be weight 500 or above. Perceived weight of light text on dark drops by one notch; compensate.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are shadowless at rest unless they are interactive cards or floating elements. Do not add shadows to headers, nav items, or static sections for depth.

dos: Do use Coral Spark (#E85D3D) for primary actions and active states only. Its scarcity is what makes it work.
Do use navy-tinted shadows (rgba(15,37,68,...)) for all box-shadow declarations.
Do maintain weight 500 or above for any text on the Deep Harbour navy sidebar.
Do use Manrope as the sole typeface — weight contrast (400 vs 700) creates hierarchy.
Do use the Warm Divider border (#DDD5CC) for all input outlines and card strokes.
Do apply border-radius: 14px to hotel cards and map containers.
Do keep the coral accent to ≤2 simultaneous on-screen uses.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS blue (Material blue, Bootstrap primary, or any non-Deep-Harbour blue). Must not look like HubSpot or Salesforce.
Don't use pastel, soft, or pink-adjacent tones as UI color. Coral Spark is warm, not sweet.
Don't use consumer travel UI patterns — large hero images, star-rating rows, booking-engine forms.
Don't apply border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe — background tint or nothing.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text). Emphasis is weight and size.
Don't add shadows to static content — shadows signal interactivity, not decoration.
Don't put Coral Spark on inactive or default states.
Don't use cool-gray neutrals — all neutrals come from the warm or navy ramp.
